meaning: n.塔希提岛(位于南太平洋,法属波利西亚的经济活动中心)
examples: When Captain Cook asked the chiefs in Tahiti why they always ate apart and alone, they replied, "Because it is right."
Tahiti lies in the South Pacific.
He carried the expedition safely to Tahiti, built fortifications, and erected instruments for the observations, which were admirably made.
If he had, I'd be worth eight hundred million dollars today and living in Tahiti.
Gauguin later moved to Tahiti, where he produced some of his most famous works.
